goal: Codify Stage-5 boundary checks as a deterministic checker registry, separate the story executor (producer) from the wf-run driver (verifier + committer), and add schema-validated artefacts so check definitions cannot drift between skill prose and canon.

stories.title: Bootstrap: registry + check_6 + driver-owned commit + executor protocol + gate write
stories.intent: Land the producer/verifier/committer separation in one transaction. Establish the checker registry skeleton, the check-result and executor-result schemas, the woof check stage-5 and woof gate write subcommands, and the revised wf-run driver loop so check_6_critique_blocker enforces the E181 failure case before any subsequent E182 story executes.

stories.title: Stage-5 cheap runners: outcome-markers, scope, plan-crossrefs, commit-transaction
stories.intent: Implement the four filesystem-only Stage-5 check runners (checks 2, 3, 5, 7) registered against the S1 skeleton. Lands the fail-loud branch of check_7_commit_transaction (no auto-staging of missing .woof durable files).

stories.title: Stage-5 expensive runners: quality-gates, contract-refs, docs-drift, review-valve
stories.intent: Implement the four shell-out / external-validator Stage-5 check runners (checks 1, 4, 8, 9). check_4_contract_refs subprocess-invokes the existing woof check-cd CLI; refactoring its body is deferred per OQ4. With these four landed, woof check stage-5 --self-test exits 0.

stories.title: woof state classify (filesystem-only) + drift-detection tests for skill prose
stories.intent: Add the side-effect-free state classifier subcommand consumed by /wf reconstitution and wf-run, plus the two CI-time drift detectors (registry-vs-skill-prose snapshot, executor-skill purity static-string assertion) that prevent prose-encoded checks from re-emerging at any stage.
